old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-hwup","title":"[codereview-pass2-security] Gateway lacks TX queue integration and RPL SRH insertion for downward traffic","description":"P1: mesh-to-mesh packets require SourceRoutingHeader insertion per RFC6554 to prevent blackholing in non-storing RPL. No SCHC recompress after SRH (packet size changes). No TX queue (lichen_core::tx_queue or SlipFramer.queue). Potential buffer overflow or drop without queue. codereview-tagged. See lichen-rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader and lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs.
